Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorney'S Fees, Declaration Of John Scott Carter In Support Thereof; [Proposed] Order
Off Calendar Jan-22-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. DONNA ETEMADI, Esq. of Etemadi Legal Group PC (tel: 323-688-0616) for Plaintiff.
Atty. GARY BEMIS, Esq. of Law Offices of Gary A. Bemis, APC (tel: 951-588-2080) for Defendant Gary Bemis.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT GARY BEMIS' Motion For Attorney's Fees.

Matter argued. Upon conclusion, the Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant Gary Bemis' motion for attorney's fees is granted in part. Mr. Bemis is awarded $6,000 in reasonable fees for his counsel's work on his successful anti-SLAPP motion. The award is calculated based on ten hours or attorney time at $450 per hour and 10 hours of paralegal time at $150 per hour. Plaintiff Virginia Jones' request for sanctions in the form of a reduction off the award to Mr. Bemis is denied. Ms. Jones has not shown that Mr. Bemis acted frivolously or for the purpose of delay.

Order signed.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/HEK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorney'S Fees, Declaration Of John Scott Carter In Support Thereof; [Proposed] Order

MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. DONNA ETAMADI, Esq. of Etamadi Legal Group PC (tel: 323-688-0616) for Plaintiff.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT GARY BEMIS' Motion For Attorney'S Fees.

Matter discussed. Counsel Donna Etamadi states the parties have filed a stipulation to continue the matter. The Court advises counsel that stipulations take about a week to be processed. Upon conclusion of discussion, the Court continues the matter to January 22, 2025 at 9:30 A.M. in Department 301.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/HEK)
